scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:examples && npm run build:demo
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/core && npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react
scripts.build:examples: npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-basic-example && npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-stepper-example && npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-list-navigator-example
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/core && npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react && npm run build --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react && npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-basic-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-stepper-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/react-list-navigator-example && npm run typecheck --workspace @tilt-to-edit/demo
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
